title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies:
Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wilderness Lodges India Digital Technologies!
